title: Is Connor Murphy dead or alive? What we know about the viral rumor surrounding the YouTube bodybuilder
summary_full: Connor Murphy’s reported death remains an unconfirmed rumor as of July 2026. Claims circulating online largely stem from social media posts and statements that have not been independently verified. No family member, representative, or authority has confirmed his death. Murphy rose to fame through fitness and bodybuilding content, and questions about his current status remain unanswered pending official information.
